headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 12, 2026**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies took the lead in the late innings to secure a 3-4 win over the Arizona Diamondbacks. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with a home run and three RBIs, while Taijuan Walker earned the win with five strong innings.

Injuries and availability impacted several teams, with Adley Rutschman being placed on the 10-day injured list due to left ankle inflammation for the Baltimore Orioles. The Tampa Bay Rays also placed Joe Boyle on the 15-day injured list retroactive to April 10, 2026, due to a right elbow strain.

The Milwaukee Brewers traded RF Steward Berroa to the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash, while the St. Louis Cardinals traded LHP Nick Raquet to the Baltimore Orioles for 2B Brayden Smith. The Atlanta Braves acquired RHP Victor Mederos from the Los Angeles Angels in exchange for Future Considerations and International Bonus Pool Money.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall Short in Philly**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks dropped a 3-4 decision to the Philadelphia Phillies, with the Phillies taking the lead in the late innings. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with a home run and three RBIs, while Taijuan Walker earned the win with five strong innings.

top_news.title: **Marlins Fall to Tigers in Dominant 6-1 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers secured a convincing 6-1 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Riley Greene leading the charge at the plate. Greene's impressive performance included two hits, one home run, and four RBIs, while Casey Mize earned the win with 5.2 innings pitched, five strikeouts, and one earned run.

top_news.title: **Pirates Pull Off Thrilling 4-3 Victory Over Cubs**
top_news.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates edged out the Chicago Cubs in a close game, securing a 4-3 win. Braxton Ashcraft led the Pirates' pitching effort with 5.0 innings, 9 strikeouts, 1 earned run, and 1 walk.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays 7-4**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins secured a 7-4 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Trevor Larnach leading the offense. Joe Ryan earned the win, pitching 7.0 innings with 5 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Rutschman Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Baltimore Orioles catcher Adley Rutschman has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to left ankle inflammation. The injury occurred on April 11, 2026.

top_news.title: **Brewers Make Roster Move Ahead of Friday's Game**
top_news.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers traded RF Steward Berroa to the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash on April 8, 2026.
